title: 誰だろうと風紀は絶対っス！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot some students asking Bamboo Memory and
Inari One for help.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
So what're ya sayin' exactly? That there's a ghost
livin' in the mountains near the academy?

text_block_list.name: Scared Student
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's been coming down all the way
from the mountain to the school, and it's even
been sighted in the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, that sure sounds like a threat to
academy order!

text_block_list.name: Anxious Student
text_block_list.text:
And a lot of students are losing sleep 'cause
they're so scared it's gonna g-go into their room...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't worry! If that spookster shows up, I'll
take care of it right there and then!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Always reliable, Inari! You're the embodiment of
chivalry!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I can't just sit back eating popcorn
when there are younger students in trouble!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then I'm gonna do what I can too! Let's get right
into it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Time to head up the mountain and teach that
ghost a lesson!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gotta strike while the iron's haunted! Let's go,
Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Waaaaahhhhh! W-wait! Lemme go! I'm not
mentally prepared yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory grabs a panicked Inari One's
hand and races off in a whirlwind... Or so it seems,
but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Almost forgot! You there!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It'd be unethical to have students climbing up the
mountain unaccompanied! So...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We need you to come with us as our guardian!
Please and thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so I find myself getting dragged along to
the mysterious mountain.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, Bamboo? I feel like someone's been
watching us this whole time...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Worry not! If it's just looking at us, that must
mean it's too scared to make a move!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
R-right! Yeah! Nothing's gonna scare us if we stick
togeth—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: W-w-w-wait a minute! When did it get so dark?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It continues to get darker and darker around us,
intensifying the indescribably sinister atmosphere!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah, something's coming.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
W-w-we gotta get outta here! This place is way
too creepy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oooh, it's getting closer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Now! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Using her bamboo sword, Bamboo Memory
delivers a single blow to a tree. Upon doing so,
the sinister atmosphere enshrouding the area
disperses instantly.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yes! Looks like I landed that one!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
S-so we're safe now? Thank goodness... By the
way, I had no idea you knew how to exorcise
ghosts.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who said I did?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry! When it comes to fighting, it's all
about spirit! If you scare off your opponent, that
makes you the winner!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...At least that's what they said in this show I
watched ages ago! Glad I managed to teach ol'
ghosty a lesson!
choice_data_list: Guess this means we can relax.
Guess this means we can relax.
You two make a great duo.
You two make a great duo.
...What if the ghost hadn't gotten scared?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...At least that's what they said in this show I
watched ages ago! Glad I managed to teach ol'
ghosty a lesson!
choice_data_list: Guess this means we can relax.
Guess this means we can relax.
You two make a great duo.
You two make a great duo.
...What if the ghost hadn't gotten scared?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Then I would've teamed up with Inari and blown it
away with a wave of guts!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...That would've been cooler, though. Imagine all
the passion! Still, all's well that ends well!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
B-Bamboo... You're seriously out of your mind,
y-you know that? Geez...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...I guess the ghost backed off without any fuss,
so that worked out okay for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like we walked a fine line between life and
death, but it seems as though the case has been
closed.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A g-great duo? I was too scared to even do
anything! I don't need your consolation...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about?! You were the one
who volunteered to defeat the ghost and protect
the younger students in the first place!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just brought the energy so I wouldn't embarrass
you! This was all you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
B-Bamboo... Gaaah! I sure am lucky to have
someone like you around!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh... If any other ghosts start acting up
at the academy, just leave it to us!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You said it! Now everyone at the academy can
live their lives in peace!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Still, that was real touch-and-go for a second
there. I'm glad you were with me, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ghost or no ghost, no one's disturbing the peace!
Not as long as Inari and I are around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following their successful exorcism, Bamboo
Memory and Inari One are flooded with requests
to handle other ghosts.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You said it! Now everyone at the academy can
live their—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's up? Cat got your tongue?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It just feels like that unsettling
atmosphere's still lingering somehow...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe that ghost still hasn't learned its lesson!
I'll have to give it another thwack for good
measure!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
H-hold up! Don't leave me behind in this creepy
place!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Mission complete! Okay, let's head back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I don't wanna stick around here for too
long.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's up with you? You look like you're
carrying a huge load or somethin'...
choice_data_list: M-my right shoulder... feels kinda heavy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So anyone with enough determination can scare
ghosts away... But what if you're too terrified to
show that determination?
